'''Gab'borah Hise''' was [[Ygabba Hise|Ygabba's]] father and a dessert chef for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]]. Once a head chef at a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], Gab'borah was considered "too successful" and was taken to serve Jabba. He was a friend of [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in [[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]. Ygabba was taken away from her father by a [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|CIS]] [[Neimoidian/Legends|Neimoidian]] named [[Gilramos Libkath]] and was saved by Boba, who brought her back to Gab'borah Hise. Gab'borah and Ygabba re-fitted Boba's armor so it fit him easily.

He was renowned for his delicious [[Ziziibbon truffle]]s.
